name: The 1619 Project: A New Origin Story
description: Pulitzer Prize Board anthology examining slavery's role in American history. Required reading for AP US History labor unit.

name: Lies My Teacher Told Me - 30th Anniversary
description: James Loewen critique of US history textbooks. Used in AP US History critical thinking unit.

name: A People's History of the United States
description: Howard Zinn classic covering US history from marginalized perspectives. Labor movement chapters core to pilot unit.

name: BEU Contract Fight 2027 Tote Bag
description: Canvas tote bag with BEU Eastbridge solidarity design. Sold at chapter meetings to support legal fund.

name: AP US History Barrons Prep 2026
description: Comprehensive AP US History review book with practice exams. Recommended to all five AP sections.

name: Primary Source Laminated Map Set - American Revolution
description: Set of 6 laminated maps for Lexington and Concord unit. Used during November 2026 field trip prep.

name: Reconstruction Era DBQ Document Bundle
description: College Board licensed primary source bundle for Reconstruction DBQ unit. Includes 12 documents with teacher notes.

name: The Warmth of Other Suns - Isabel Wilkerson
description: Great Migration narrative used in World History 10 civil rights unit. 30 copies for classroom library.

name: BEU Eastbridge Chapter T-Shirt - Contract Fight
description: Contract Fight 2027 T-shirt for members. Blue with BEU logo and contract expiry date.

name: Dry-Erase Markers 24-Pack Assorted Colors
description: Classroom supply for daily use. Ordered September and January each year.

name: Garmin Forerunner 55 Running Watch
description: GPS running watch for tracking Mon/Wed/Sat training runs. Current device purchased January 2025.

name: The Half Has Never Been Told - Edward Baptist
description: Economic history of slavery for AP US History period 4 unit. Teacher edition with supplemental materials.

name: Chromebook Charging Cart 30-Bay
description: Classroom Chromebook charging station. Eastbridge IT asset, not personally purchased.

name: DBQ Practice Workbook AP US History 5 Steps
description: Additional DBQ practice workbook for after-school AP prep sessions Tuesdays 3:15PM.

name: The New Jim Crow - Michelle Alexander
description: Used in World History 10 social justice unit. Personal copy and 10 classroom copies.

name: Index Cards 4x6 500 Count
description: Used for student document analysis activities and AP study aids. Ordered monthly during school year.

name: Wilson Evolution Basketball
description: Team basketball for Thursday Dorchester Community Center league. Used by The Historians.

name: Between the World and Me - Ta-Nehisi Coates
description: Assigned in World History 10. Personal copy annotated for discussion questions.

name: BEU Organizing Manual 2025 Edition
description: BEU field organizing guide for building reps. Covers grievance procedures, member rights, contract campaigns.

name: Laser Printer Paper Case 5-Ream
description: Classroom paper supply. Ordered from school supply budget twice per semester.
